pi_items.source: Checked export_result.sh which exports the state to '/tmp/leave_policy_restructure_result.json'.
Task description mandates creating 'Compensatory Time Off'. setup_task.sh ensures it is removed during setup.
setup_orangehrm.sh SQL seed assigns EMP003 to David Nguyen, EMP010 to Amanda Davis, and EMP017 to Brian Taylor, which the task description lists as the finance employees.
Task description specifies the mandated Annual Leave is 12 days.
Task description states 10 days of Sick Leave must be added to each Finance employee.
verifier.py checks if the agent scored at least 60 points to pass.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically seeded OrangeHRM database. Finance employees are David Nguyen (EMP003), Amanda Davis (EMP010), and Brian Taylor (EMP017). The correct target for the new leave type is 'Compensatory Time Off'. The annual leave for the specified employees must be corrected to 12 days, and a sick leave of 10 days must be added.
